text: When the professor says the exam will be easy
image_description: A person laughing nervously while sweating profusely, looking at a stack of textbooks.

text: You got this! Believe in yourself and never give up!
image_description: A cute cat standing on top of a mountain with a sunrise in the background, wearing a tiny cape.

text: Nobody: ... Absolutely nobody: ... Me at 3 AM: Is cereal a soup?
image_description: A person sitting in bed in the dark, staring wide-eyed at the ceiling with a thoughtful expression.

text: When they said 'just be yourself' but yourself is the whole problem
image_description: A person pointing at themselves in a mirror with a confused expression.

text: Some people need a high five. In the face. With a chair.
image_description: A person sitting at a desk looking extremely frustrated while reading an email on a computer screen.

text: That feeling when you finally finish a group project and did all the work yourself
image_description: A person carrying multiple heavy bags and boxes while their group members walk ahead empty-handed.

text: Rise and grind! Success doesn't come to those who sleep in!
image_description: A person in business attire jogging at sunrise on a scenic mountain trail.

text: Sure, let me just add that to my list of things I'll pretend to care about
image_description: A person at a meeting table with an obviously fake smile, holding a notepad with scribbles on it.

text: My bank account after payday vs my bank account two days later
image_description: Split image: left side shows a happy child holding balloons, right side shows a sad dog sitting in the rain.

text: Keep pushing forward. Every setback is a setup for a comeback!
image_description: A person crossing the finish line of a marathon with arms raised in celebration, surrounded by cheering spectators.
